subject: CryoET imaging & analysis position at FMI - Basel
body:
Hi everyone,

I wanted to share an open position at FMI that might be of interest to this
group. We are looking for someone to support cryo-ET projects, with a
strong focus on data processing and analysis, as part of an expanding
cryo-ET setup that now includes in-house cryoFIB.

If you know someone who might be interested,  we would really appreciate
you sharing this.

https://www.fmi.ch/education-careers/positions/jobdetails.html?jobID=325

Best regards,
Selma
